message:
test: cleanup imports, modernize formatting, and add tracing scenario helper

- Remove unused imports across test modules (NodeId, Arc, NoopWaker)
- Update debug formatting to modern Rust idiom ({var:?} style)
- Add #![allow(missing_docs)] and clippy suppression attributes to test modules
- Fix hex literal formatting for readability (0x0005_4415_2445_u64)
- Add setup_trace_replay_scenario() helper for sharding test setup
- Improve assertion formatting for complex multi-field assertions
- Remove unused NoopWaker struct and unnecessary Arc clone

No functional test behavior changes — style and lint cleanup only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
